name: test_should_construct_date_time_with_named_time_zone[{year: 1984, quarter: 3, dayOfQuarter: 45, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, microsecond: 645876, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'}-'1984-08-14T12:31:14.645876+02:00[Europe/Stockholm]']

statusDetails.message:
gdm_tck.exceptions.ResultComparisonError: Results do not match (any order comparison)
Expected: [{'result': '1984-08-14T12:31:14.645876+02:00[Europe/Stockholm]'}]
Actual:   [{'result': '1984-01-01T12:31:14.000000000+01:00'}]
statusDetails.trace:
E   gdm_tck.exceptions.ResultComparisonError: Results do not match (any order comparison)
    Expected: [{'result': '1984-08-14T12:31:14.645876+02:00[Europe/Stockholm]'}]
    Actual:   [{'result': '1984-01-01T12:31:14.000000000+01:00'}]
